FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Veteran Settlers
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A group of retired soldiers has arrived at one of your settlements, looking to put down roots after years of fighting. They're experienced, disciplined, and willing to contribute — but in what capacity? Their combat skills are obvious, but they could serve the community in other ways.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Welcome them into the garrison. We can always use experienced fighters.
They've fought enough. Give them land and tools — we need workers.
Hold a ceremony in their honor. Let them retire in peace.
These veterans know how to command. Integrate them into our officer corps.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Veterans Enlisted
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The veterans eagerly join the garrison, bringing years of combat experience. They quickly improve training regimens and defensive protocols. The settlement's military capability is permanently enhanced.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Veterans Settled
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The veterans trade their weapons for tools and settle into civilian life. Their military discipline translates well into productive work — they're organized, efficient, and tireless. The settlement's workforce grows and improves.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Heroes Honored
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The ceremony is a moving tribute to the veterans' service. Citizens are inspired by their stories of sacrifice and duty. The veterans retire contentedly, and a wave of patriotic pride sweeps through the settlement.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Officers Integrated
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The veterans' command experience proves invaluable. Integrated into the officer corps, they restructure unit tactics and improve coordination between squads. The settlement's military becomes both larger and more efficient.
